register.title: Create Account
register.description: Sign up to securely access your personal dashboard.

create.title: Create Mailbox
create.description: Generate a custom or random temporary email instantly.

manage.title: Manage Messages
manage.description: Receive and read incoming emails in real time.

webhook.title: Webhooks
webhook.description: Send real-time notifications to your server when new mail arrives.

openapi.title: OpenAPI
openapi.description: Integrate TianMail with your app through standard REST APIs.

share.title: Sharing
share.description: Share one message or an entire mailbox with others.

1.question: Do I need to register?
1.answer: Yes, registration is required to manage your temporary mailboxes securely.

2.question: How long do emails last?
2.answer: Emails are stored temporarily and automatically deleted after they expire.

3.question: Can I send emails?
3.answer: Sending functionality is available for users with appropriate permissions.

4.question: Can I have multiple mailboxes?
4.answer: Yes, you can create and manage multiple temporary email addresses from a single account.

5.question: How to access OpenAPI?
5.answer: You can access the OpenAPI definition at https://email.tianzora.uno/api.html#openapi. Authentication requires an API Key from your profile.

introduction.title: 1. Introduction
introduction.content: Welcome to TianMail. We value your privacy and work to keep your data secure while using our temporary email service.

collection.title: 2. Information Collection
collection.content: To provide account functionality, we collect only the minimum required information such as username and login identifiers.

emailContent.title: 3. Email Content
emailContent.content: Messages sent to temporary addresses are stored based on validity settings and removed automatically after expiration.

thirdParty.title: 4. Third-Party Services
thirdParty.content: We may rely on necessary third-party infrastructure such as cloud hosting and security services.

contact.title: 5. Contact
contact.content: If you have questions about this policy, please contact us through the project repository.

acceptance.title: 1. Acceptance
acceptance.content: By accessing and using TianMail, you agree to comply with these terms.

description.title: 2. Service Description
description.content: TianMail provides temporary disposable email addresses on an "as-is" basis for lawful use.

items.2: Using the service for illegal activities.

disclaimer.title: 4. Disclaimer
disclaimer.content: We do not guarantee uninterrupted service availability. Temporary messages may be removed according to policy.

changes.title: 5. Changes to Terms
changes.content: We reserve the right to update these terms when necessary.
